overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a historic urban district at dusk. The character transitions from a cobblestone plaza beside an illuminated neoclassical building, crosses a street with vintage 1960s vehicles, and continues along a waterfront promenade lined with Spanish moss-draped trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic plaza with illuminated neoclassical museum

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street beside the grand museum building with tall columns

entered.detail: large stone building with tall classical columns and illuminated facade
green 1960s era station wagon parked near the curb
tall black lampposts with warm glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone plaza at dusk, passing an imposing neoclassical museum building lit with spotlights. The area is quiet with few pedestrians, vintage cars parked nearby, and street lamps providing warm illumination against the purple-orange sky.

events.description: passes the corner of the museum building into a more open street intersection
approaches a green vintage car parked near the curb

agents.ego_description: continuing past the building corner toward the street intersection, passing a red phone booth

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and suspenders walking toward the camera

entered.detail: classic British-style red telephone booth on the sidewalk
green 1960s sedan parked at the curb
white painted STOP text on the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the museum, the character enters a street corner with a red phone booth and vintage green car visible. A pedestrian in a white shirt approaches from the opposite direction as the character heads toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing leading to waterfront promenade

events.description: crosses the asphalt road as a red vintage car drives past from right to left
steps onto the sidewalk and approaches the waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while avoiding traffic, then stepping onto the opposite sidewalk near the water

notable_agents.action: red vintage sedan driving past from right to left

entered.detail: wooden fence railing along the edge of the water
calm body of water reflecting the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street as a red vintage car drives by, then reaches the opposite sidewalk where a wooden railing overlooks a calm lake. Other pedestrians are visible walking along the waterfront path.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with lake view and tree canopy

events.description: sun glare becomes visible through the trees as the character walks eastward

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path, passing pedestrians and observing the lake

notable_agents.action: woman in gray dress sitting on a bench facing the water
woman in red top and white skirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large oak trees draped with Spanish moss overhanging the path
large modernist building visible across the lake

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade, the character passes beneath large oak trees with Spanish moss while the sun creates a glare through the branches. The path follows the calm lake with a modern office building visible in the distance across the water, and several pedestrians stroll or sit on benches enjoying the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, illuminated neoclassical plaza toward a scenic waterfront promenade at dusk. It begins by trailing the character along a cobblestone square past a spotlighted museum building under a purple-orange sky. As the character moves past the museum, the scene shifts toward a street corner featuring a red phone booth and vintage cars before crossing an asphalt road. The camera then follows the character onto a sidewalk with a wooden railing, where the urban environment opens up to a calm lake. Finally, the path leads beneath large oak trees draped in Spanish moss, with the sun creating a glare through the branches as the character walks past strolling pedestrians toward a distant office building across the water.
